---
title: "Take-Home Exercise Index"
author: "Yee Weicong Mark"
date: "April 25, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

## [Take-Home Exercises Index]{style="color:  #4682B4; font-size: 38px;"}

:::: {style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; border-left: 4px solid #2C5282; padding: 10px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 10px;"}
![](images/clipboard-151564721.png){width="232"}

::: {style="flex: 1;"}
**Take-home Assignment 1 — Exploring profitability and volatility in a Spanish motor insurance portfolio**

The analysis covers a Spanish motor insurance portfolio of 352,338 policy years from 2022 to 2024.

[Read more →](TH_EX01.html)
:::
::::
